context: Verify that the agent uses keyword search, presents a candidate list, qualifies results as CrossRef-ranked (not exhaustive), and does not auto-download or auto-triage.

checklist.name: Keyword subcommand used with --keyword flag
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with 'search --keyword "federated learning privacy"' and sets --results to 8 or a reasonable value.

checklist.name: Candidate list is presented to the user
checklist.description: The agent displays a list of result titles, authors, years, and DOIs framed as candidates for user review.

checklist.name: Results qualified as CrossRef-ranked, not exhaustive
checklist.description: The agent notes that results are returned by CrossRef relevance ranking and do not represent all papers on the topic.

checklist.name: No automatic download or triage occurs
checklist.description: The agent does not download any PDF or invoke triage-paper without explicit user confirmation.
